---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Use Case

Explain the problem this feature would solve or the benefit it would provide.

**Example**: "I want to predict [property] for [type of molecules] because [reason]."

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working.

## Scientific Basis

If applicable, provide references to scientific methods or papers that support this feature:

- Paper Title, Authors, Journal, DOI
- Brief explanation of the method

## Alternative Approaches

Are there alternative ways to achieve the same goal?

## Implementation Ideas

If you have ideas about how to implement this:

- Potential algorithms
- Required data/models
- Integration points in current codebase

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, mockups, or examples.

## Checklist

- [ ] I've checked [existing issues](https://github.com/ardit-mishra/biostudio/issues) for similar requests
- [ ] This feature aligns with the project's scope (computational drug discovery)
- [ ] I've provided scientific references (if applicable)
- [ ] I'm willing to contribute to implementation (optional)

## Priority

How important is this feature to you?

- [ ] Critical - blocking my research
- [ ] High - would significantly improve my workflow
- [ ] Medium - nice to have
- [ ] Low - minor enhancement
